BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORPORATION MOTION TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE DISMISSAL IS DENIED FOR INVALID PROOF OF SERVICE. IT WAS SERVED BY MAIL ON MAY 25, 2006, EARLIEST HEARING DATE WOULD BE JUNE 26, 2006. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189.
ORDER SETTING ASIDE AND VACATING DISMISSAL
